title: Coding Dependency Bootstrap Policy
purpose: Ensure coding/codemod stages use structural code tools instead of regex/string patching.

rules.when: task_class includes coding, code patching, Python script repair, codemod, mutation engine patching, governed_run patching, validator patching, or OS script modification
must: run 0_kernel/scripts/ensure_libcst_available_v1.py before structural Python code edits
prefer vendored LibCST for format-preserving Python code transforms
fallback to Python ast + safe_code_patch_helpers_v1.py only if LibCST bootstrap fails

rules.when: LibCST is missing from 0_kernel/vendor/python and pip/network are available
must: install LibCST into 0_kernel/vendor/python, not global site-packages
verify import and parse behavior after install
commit vendor dependency and receipt before using it

must_not: use regex-only or string replacement-only structural patching
print success before re-reading the file and verifying required markers/behavior
